creator: james.stewartnewman@sas.com
text:
trying to setup the cluster interconnect for CTL HA 
kernel setting kern.cam.ctl.ha does not seem to exist but is listed on the man page when setting receive the following error 

sysctl: unknown oid 'kern.cam.ctl.ha_peer'

tried setting in both /boot/loader.conf and in /etc/sysctl.conf
